selection_source: Chatbot Arena, OpenRouter model catalog, provider docs, or another documented source

selection_policy.primary_goal: Use one concrete provider model id for the first within-model condition comparison.
selection_policy.matching_rule: If expanding to multiple models, use models from a similar capability band and document the source score/date.

primary_pilot_model.reason_for_selection: Chosen as the first single-model pilot reviewer after documenting capability source and API availability.
known_limitations: The first pilot compares conditions within the same model; it does not support cross-model superiority claims.
